title: ^# ตอนที่ (\d+) (.+)$
body_required: Body paragraphs separated by blank line
(จบบท) at end of body
หมายเหตุการแปล: section after another ---
paragraphs:
separated by single blank line (

), no trailing spaces, final newline at end

naturalness.adverb_doubling: Replace -ๆ doubling (e.g., เดินช้าๆ) with more concise phrasing
naturalness.dialogue_anchoring: Anchor dialogue in small, involuntary physical actions; rotate paragraph entry points (dialogue-first, mid-action, sound/sensation)

policies.scene_integrity: Keep all scene beats (openings, motivations, transitions, rewards, cliffhangers). Never skip or summarize explicit scenes.
policies.intimacy: Translate explicit content with euphemistic Thai (e.g., แนบ/สัมผัส/จูบ).
policies.doubt: When in doubt, prefer a lighter translation (แปลแบบเบา) combined with ellipses to imply the action rather than skipping it.
